understanding.goal_understanding: Complete all goal cells in each level by making the carried piece's shape, color, and rotation match the goal's requirements. Navigate the grid, manage stamina, and use modifier tiles to adjust your piece. Losing all stamina costs a life, and losing all lives ends the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: You control a piece on a grid. Each turn you can move (N, S, E, W) which costs 1 stamina. Some tiles are walls that block movement. Modifier tiles change your piece when you step on them: shape modifier cycles shape, color modifier cycles color, rotation modifier rotates 90° clockwise. To complete a goal, you must step onto its cell when your piece exactly matches the goal's required shape, color, and rotation. Stamina management is crucial; running out costs a life. The game seems to have multiple levels with different grid layouts and goal configurations.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: Complete all goal cells in each level by making the carried piece's shape, color, and rotation match the goal's requirements. Navigate the grid, manage stamina, and use modifier tiles to adjust your piece. Losing all stamina costs a life, and losing all lives ends the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: You control a piece on a grid. Each turn you can move (N, S, E, W) which costs 1 stamina. Some tiles are walls that block movement. Modifier tiles change your piece when you step on them: shape modifier cycles shape, color modifier cycles color, rotation modifier rotates 90° clockwise. To complete a goal, you must step onto its cell when your piece exactly matches the goal's required shape, color, and rotation. Stamina management is crucial; running out costs a life. The game seems to have multiple levels with different grid layouts and goal configurations.
